title: alysicarpus hamosus
intro: Alysicarpus hamosus, also known as the spiny hog's snare or hairy alysicarpus, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Alysicarpus hamosus include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as supporting kidney and liver function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or applied topically to the skin.
